userStories.title: Clean remaining TurboQuant references in experiments/
userStories.description: Remove all remaining TurboQuant references in active experiment code: __init__.py docstring, validation/table7_synergy.py header, real_model/needle_haystack_real.py header, real_model/datasets/needle_dataset.py header, run_experiments_unified.py val_turboquant entry
acceptanceCriteria: experiments/__init__.py docstring mentions RaBitQ instead of TurboQuant
run_experiments_unified.py has no TurboQuant in experiment names

userStories.title: Implement Table 5 - Logit Margin Distribution experiment
userStories.description: Create experiments/core/table5_margin_distribution/ with experiment.py, run_table5.py, and config.yaml. Measures attention logit margins before/after qTTT adaptation at multiple context lengths. Reports mean margin, delta, and % achieving theoretical minimum.
acceptanceCriteria: experiments/core/table5_margin_distribution/config.yaml defines context lengths and sample counts
Quick mode runs in <60s and produces results.json
Reuses needle-in-haystack data generation from exp2

userStories.title: Implement Table 3 - Inference Benchmark experiment
userStories.description: Create experiments/core/table3_inference_benchmark/ with experiment.py, run_table3.py, and config.yaml. Measures tokens/sec, KV cache memory, p99 latency at context lengths [4K, 16K, 64K, 128K]. Compares standard inference vs ADB+RaBitQ.
acceptanceCriteria: Quick mode runs in <120s and produces results.json with throughput, memory, latency metrics
Uses torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated() or equivalent for memory measurement

userStories.title: Implement Table 8 - Accuracy-Compute Pareto experiment
userStories.description: Create experiments/core/table8_pareto/ with experiment.py, run_table8.py, and config.yaml. Tests 5 configurations: standard 32L, AttnRes static, uniform qTTT, gated qTTT, oracle gating. Measures FLOPs and accuracy, generates Pareto frontier plot.
acceptanceCriteria: Quick mode runs in <120s and produces results.json with FLOP and accuracy data
Generates Pareto frontier visualization when matplotlib is available

userStories.title: Implement RaBitQ Compression Verification experiment
userStories.description: Rename experiments/turboquant/ to experiments/rabitq/. Create run_compression_verification.py that verifies ~4.9x KV cache compression ratio and reconstruction quality. Create run_microbenchmarks.py for kernel-level profiling.
acceptanceCriteria: Quick mode runs in <30s and reports compression ratio

userStories.title: Register all new experiments in run_experiments_unified.py
userStories.description: Add table3, table5, table8, val_rabitq, val_rabitq_compression to the EXPERIMENTS registry. Update val_turboquant to val_rabitq. Add paper table references to existing experiment descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: table3, table5, table8 registered with correct scripts and args
Paper table numbers referenced in descriptions

userStories.title: Verify all experiments run in quick mode
userStories.description: Run the full experiment suite in quick mode: python experiments/run_experiments_unified.py --all --quick. Fix any import errors, missing dependencies, or runtime issues.
acceptanceCriteria: All core experiments (exp1-exp6) pass in quick mode
New experiments (table3, table5, table8) pass in quick mode
No import errors or missing module issues
Execution summary shows all experiments as 'success'

userStories.title: Update documentation to reflect new experiment structure
userStories.description: Update experiments/README.md, experiments/docs/ to reflect new table3/table5/table8 experiments, RaBitQ rename, and paper table mapping. Update AGENTS.md with experiment conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: experiments/README.md lists all 10+ experiments with paper table references
AGENTS.md updated with experiment development conventions
docs/core_experiments.md updated with new experiment descriptions
